title: pelargonium × hoareanum
intro: Pelargonium × hoareanum, also known as Rose Geranium or Pelargonium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant within the Geraniaceae family. The plant is known for its fragrant leaves and flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × hoareanum include relieving symptoms of stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as easing menstrual cramps and digestive issues. The plant's leaves can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
